events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: the staged thread sealant is a general-purpose/plumbing compound (or plain white PTFE tape), not one listed/rated for resistance to natural gas or LP-gas as required by IFGC 403.9.1 and NFPA 54 for threaded gas joints — this must be swapped for a gas-rated (yellow) tape or listed gas pipe dope before any joints are made up. Marked `fail` / `high` risk since proceeding with assembly would create a non-compliant, leak-prone joint.
